plugins.name: solid-developer
plugins.description: Strict SOLID enforcement with language-specific references (R, JS, TS, Python, C/C++)

plugins.name: unit-tester
plugins.description: Disciplined unit-test authoring and review (FIRST, AAA, public-API-only, precise behaviour names)

plugins.name: general-developer
plugins.description: Language-agnostic developer subagent — pairs with solid-developer and unit-tester
